{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Valinhall healing pool
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|There is a [[Valinhall healing pool]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|Victims might have had access to [[Valinhall]]'s healing pool.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c19">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
